tweets.text: How Much of the Vedas Has Been Lost? A Truth That Should Shake Every Indian. What if I told you that what we call the Vedas today is only a tiny surviving fragment of a once vast ocean of knowledge? Ancient Bharatiya tradition did not consist of just four books.
